name: Furball Over the Front
short_description: Take to the skies over the western front in this WW1 casual run and gun style Sim-Shooter. Play as an Allied or German pilot in 6 different planes from 1915-1918. Balloon Busting, Ground Attack, and Dogfighting missions await you!
detailed_description:
Take to the skies over the western front in this WW1 casual run and gun style Sim-Shooter. Play as an Allied or German pilot in 6 different planes from 1915-1918. Balloon Busting, Ground Attack, and Dogfighting missions await you!

  • Supports Touch / Mouse / XBOX controller

  • 3 Allied planes to fly: Airco DH2, Nieuport, and the Sopwith Camel, each more maneuverable and durable than the last

  • 3 German planes to fly: Fokker E, Albatros D, and the Fokker Triplane, each more maneuverable and durable than the last

  • 5 Historical Aces to shoot down or fly with: Max Immelmann, Oswald Boelcke, Werner Voss, Erwin Böhme, and Manfred von Richthofen (the Red Baron)

  • 100+ missions in story mode covering the spring of 1916 to the spring of 1918 (Allied) or the fall of 1915 to the spring of 1918 (German)

  • Ground attack, balloon busting, and aerial dogfighting

  • Earn endurance missions, medals, and increase your rank as you complete the story missions

  • Ground attack, balloon busting, and aerial dogfighting

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Ukrainian
